title: ECharts Segment 10
summary: This segment spans PRs #18786-#19628, covering the ECharts 5.5.0 release cycle. Major areas include tooltip valueFormatter enhancements (adding dataIndex), pie chart padAngle support, sunburst label rotation fixes, i18n locale expansion (Arabic, Dutch, new translation keys for aria), SSR client packaging, build/release infrastructure (ESM exports, package.json maps, notice year updates), and various bug fixes across chart types (graph force layout, polar axis angles, pictorial bar clipping, visualMap mouse events, label guide alignment).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment spans PRs #18786-#19628, covering the ECharts 5.5.0 release cycle. Major areas include tooltip valueFormatter enhancements (adding dataIndex), pie chart padAngle support, sunburst label rotation fixes, i18n locale expansion (Arabic, Dutch, new translation keys for aria), SSR client packaging, build/release infrastructure (ESM exports, package.json maps, notice year updates), and various bug fixes across chart types (graph force layout, polar axis angles, pictorial bar clipping, visualMap mouse events, label guide alignment).

nodes.label: Core Utilities
nodes.description: Shared utility modules including types.ts (type definitions extended for tooltip valueFormatter dataIndex, sampler min/max), format.ts, states.ts, innerStore.ts, and graphic.ts. Touched by PRs 18786, 18921, 18950, 19111, 19123, 19279, 19461, 19526, 19558 and release PRs.

nodes.label: ECharts Core
nodes.description: Core echarts.ts (init, type exports, locale fallback, SSR legend hover safety) and locale.ts. Touched by PRs 19103, 19107, 19217, 19279, 19461, 19549, 19564 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: Tooltip view, HTML content, series formatting, and markup generation. Major changes include valueFormatter receiving dataIndex, marker opacity fix/revert, tooltip parent-node NPE fix, and HTML content pointer-events. Touched by PRs 18921, 19097, 19123, 19265, 19549, 19558 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Model Layer
nodes.description: Data format mixin for series tooltip formatting. Updated to pass dataIndex through the formatting chain. Touched by PRs 18921, 19558 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Pie Chart
nodes.description: Pie series and layout. Added padAngle option support and emphasis labelLine fix. Touched by PRs 19076.

nodes.label: Sunburst Chart
nodes.description: SunburstPiece rendering with label rotation fixes: anticlockwise rotation, float-point alignment, and label flip logic. Touched by PRs 18962, 19174, 19176.

nodes.label: Graph Chart
nodes.description: Graph series (removed duplicate GraphNodeItemOption extends) and GraphView (force layout timer fix). Touched by PRs 18901, 19514.

nodes.label: Bar Charts
nodes.description: BaseBarSeries (barWidth string type support), PictorialBarSeries and View (clipping fix). Touched by PRs 19197, 19424, 19516.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: LineView time-axis line-crossing fix. Touched by PR 18960.

nodes.label: Legend Component
nodes.description: LegendView SSR hover/tooltip safety and release updates. Touched by PRs 19279, 19549 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Axis Components
nodes.description: AxisBuilder (min/max label alignment, tick positioning), AngleAxisView and RadiusAxisView (polar endAngle support). Touched by PRs 19228, 19446, 19099.

nodes.label: Coordinate System
nodes.description: axisCommonTypes (valueAxis doc comment, markArea alignWithLabel) and polar coordinate model (endAngle option). Touched by PRs 19228, 19499, 19099.

nodes.label: Visual / Aria
nodes.description: Aria accessibility with series-type translation key support for i18n. Touched by PR 19239.

nodes.label: Internationalization
nodes.description: i18n source files (langAR, langNL, and all locale files updated with new aria translation keys) plus compiled dist i18n bundles. Major expansion of aria series-type translations across 21+ locales. Touched by PRs 19214, 19239, 19252, 19564 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Data Processing
nodes.description: Source.ts (TypedArray detection fix for dataset) and sourceHelper.ts (data helper). Touched by PRs 19035, 19473.

nodes.label: Toolbox Component
nodes.description: ToolboxView (mouse-event detection fix) and featureManager (text font style). Touched by PRs 19170, release PRs.

nodes.label: VisualMap Component
nodes.description: ContinuousView mouseover event registration fix. Touched by PR 19097.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: labelGuideHelper alignment fix for label guide lines. Touched by PR 19180.

nodes.label: Animation / Transition
nodes.description: Universal transition (universalTransition.ts) updates for type compatibility. Touched by PR 18786.

nodes.label: Data Processors
nodes.description: dataSample.ts with min/max sampler function support. Touched by PR 19279.

nodes.label: Build System
nodes.description: Build configuration (config.js, build.js, pre-publish.js) for ESM exports, dist packaging, notice year script, and release infrastructure. Also includes template files for SSR client distribution. Touched by PRs 19279, 19449, 19452, 19454, 19473, 19513, 19543, 19593 and release PRs.

nodes.label: SSR Client
nodes.description: Server-side rendering client (index.ts source and dist bundles), including ESM packaging, .eslintrc, and distribution build artifacts. Touched by PRs 19279, 19513, 19564 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Project Infrastructure
nodes.description: Top-level files including .npmignore (SSR src exclusion), NOTICE (year 2024), package.README.md, KEYS, tsconfig.json, jest config CJS, and package.json exports map. Touched by PRs 19455, 19512, 19513, 19543 and release PRs.

nodes.label: Export Declarations
nodes.description: core.ts type re-exports for echarts public API surface. Touched by PR 19103.

edges.label: format utilities used by data formatting mixin
tooltip view coordinates with legend hover
source helpers used by bar series
axis common types define axis component options
coordinate system used by line chart rendering
aria module references i18n translation keys
build generates compiled i18n dist bundles
types define sampler interfaces used by dataSample
echarts core registers component event handlers
pie emphasis uses label guide helpers
